subcodes.first_line: O fire-wrought Phoenix of the divine and kindled flame! The contents of that which was written were soul-stirring in their meaning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر پر شرر نار موقده الهیه آنچه مرقوم گشته مضمون معانی جانپرور بود و مال
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
